title: Bridge Essay: Empathy aligns brains in synchrony.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ritual** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Neural synchrony — interpersonal brain-to-brain coupling, hyperscanning, joint music-making, collective entrainment.

**Empathy aligns brains in synchrony.**. iScience.. PMID: 40510113. DOI: 10.1016/j.isci.2025.112642. Empathy is acore human capacity that underpins social life. Utilizing hyperscanning electroencephalography (EEG), we tested how empathy to others' distress synchronizes brains without social cues. Mothers and adolescents (study 1, n = 100) underwent empathy-to-distress paradigm in separate rooms. Event-related interbrain connectivity was computed in four 500 ms time-windows following exposure to empathy-to-distress and control stimuli.
